ChangeRequest.name: Additional subtype for `Debt security` entity type
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
### Overview
Suggestion to implement an additional level of subtyping to `Debt security` for consistent representation of 'Past due' information.
### Contact person
dominik.lin-ully@oenb.at, Valentina.Murano@bancaditalia.it
### Description of change request
In the `Instrument role` hierarchy, 'Past due' information, e.g., `Past due date` is managed within an individual subtype, namely `Past due financial asset instrument`.
For consistency reasons, we suggest applying the same modeling construct also to the `Debt security`, i.e., adding the subtypes `Past due debt security` and `Not past due debt security` as subtypes of `Debt security` where the `Past due debt security` would include the attribute `Date past due`.
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes
* `Debt security`
### Forward Engineering considerations
* additional multiple subtype on `Debt security` level, adjustment of discriminator treatment required?
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
